name: esp32jtag_firmware_smoke
notes: Smoke test for ESP32JTAG instrument firmware. Primary observation is USB serial log (USB Serial/JTAG, /dev/ttyACM0). Secondary: network health checks after boot. No LA wiring required — this is the instrument itself, not a DUT. HARDWARE CONSTRAINT: single native USB port, no bridge chip. RTS/DTR cannot trigger reset. If USB path is lost (crash), manual recovery required: hold BOOT + press RESET.

preflight.note: Preflight skipped — instrument is self-hosted. Serial port probed at run time.

expect_patterns: spi_master_init\(\) done, gbl_spi_h1 is Not NULL
observe_uart.note: Native USB Serial/JTAG — no bridge chip. baud=null (USB CDC). RTS/DTR MUST NOT be used for reset. If port absent at test start: firmware may have crashed; manual recovery required (BOOT+RESET).

validate_network.note: IP is DHCP-assigned. Extract from serial log pattern 'IP          :'. Then ping + TCP :4242.
